_doc: css-property-classifications.json — the DERIVED LAYER (Task A classifier output: css_property/css_layer/css_element/css_state/css_tier) generated by extract-signatures.py. This is a REGENERATED file, not hand-edited — re-run `python plugins/sgs-blocks/scripts/behavioural-analyser/extract-signatures.py` to refresh it.
